en_body:
.....the boat moors here, O waiting shore
 .....brimming tears in the winecup, remembering Three Peach Isles.....

 floating...floating clouds and waters
 the sky-frame pure
 mist-smoke lingering
 the little boat sways
 Beloved Shore, dream-bank
 greeting the gentle wind
 Light incense, smoke threading
 to rhyme the verse
 Tempests and storms
 deepen the longing
 Shore of return
 plant the pole
 forever waiting
 .....evening falls
 flocks of birds fly
 toward far nests
 their songs echo deep
 soaring over a thousand woods
 stirring a love-air adrift...

 .....the boat moors here, O waiting shore
 .....offering the Heart
 .....no longer watching
 .....for the kindred-soul guest...

CHANTING AN AIR: SERENITY
note: “Three Peach Isles” evokes the Daoist islands of the Immortals, while “kindred soul” renders tri-âm, one who truly hears and understands another.
